summary: Merged Items & Inventory page testing completed successfully. All 12 features tested and verified. Backend: 21/21 tests passed. Frontend: All 8 tabs working, header buttons conditional visibility working, item CRUD working, stock badges displayed.
critical_code_review_comments: Items.jsx correctly imports stock sub-components from StockManagement.jsx as named exports
Tabs component uses controlled value/onValueChange for proper tab switching
Header buttons (Export, Import, Subcategory Order, Download Images) correctly hidden when activeTab !== 'products'
Stock availability fetched via GET /api/stock/availability and displayed as 'Stk: N' badge per item
Sidebar shows 'Items & Inventory' label (line 45 in Layout.jsx)
/admin/stock route removed from App.js - redirects to root
StockManagement.jsx exports named components for reuse in Items.jsx
seed_data_creation: Test items and suppliers created and cleaned up during testing (prefixed with TEST_MERGED_ and TEST_UI_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Items & Inventory page merge completed. Items.jsx now contains all 8 tabs: Products, Stock Status, Opening Bal., Purchases, Sales Return, Item Ledger, User Ledger, Suppliers. Stock sub-components imported from StockManagement.jsx. Header action buttons only visible on Products tab. /admin/stock route removed.

features_tested.1. Products tab - Items list with stock: PASS - Items list loads with 'Stk: N' badge showing closing balance
features_tested.2. Products tab - Add/Edit/Delete item: PASS - All CRUD operations working with success toasts
features_tested.3. Stock Status tab: PASS - Shows table with Opening, Purchased, Sold, Closing columns
features_tested.4. Purchases tab: PASS - Shows purchase history with New Purchase button
features_tested.5. Opening Balance tab: PASS - Shows items with quantity inputs and Save All button
features_tested.6. Suppliers tab: PASS - Shows supplier list with Add/Edit/Delete functionality
features_tested.8. User Ledger tab: PASS - Has search input for customer name/phone
features_tested.9. Sales Return tab: PASS - Has New Sales Return button
features_tested.10. Header buttons visibility: PASS - Export, Import, Subcategory Order, Download Images only visible on Products tab
features_tested.11. Sidebar label: PASS - Shows 'Items & Inventory' (no separate 'Stock & Inventory' entry)
features_tested.12. /admin/stock route removed: PASS - Route redirects to root (not a separate page)
